meta.usage: Font and typography resource profile for battle UI

runtime.reason: BattleFontResources loads downloaded TTF files by UI role. Labels render with system font first, then switch to Font assets after resources.load succeeds.

downloadedAssets.name: Smiley Sans / 得意黑
downloadedAssets.recommendedUse: Logo、副标题、Boss 名牌、商业感强的斜体艺术字

downloadedAssets.name: ZCOOL KuaiLe / 站酷快乐体
downloadedAssets.recommendedUse: 开始战斗、强化标题、强化卡标题、按钮主字

downloadedAssets.name: ZCOOL QingKe HuangYou / 站酷庆科黄油体
downloadedAssets.recommendedUse: 资源数字、HUD 标签、轻传奇硬朗标题

downloadedAssets.name: ZCOOL XiaoWei / 站酷小薇体
downloadedAssets.recommendedUse: 古风说明字、剧情章名、备用卡牌标题

downloadedAssets.name: Ma Shan Zheng / 马善政毛笔楷书
downloadedAssets.recommendedUse: Boss 来袭、关卡掉落、强反馈喊字

downloadedAssets.name: Long Cang / 龙藏体
downloadedAssets.recommendedUse: 古风标题、剧情章名、沙城氛围字

downloadedAssets.name: Liu Jian Mao Cao / 刘建毛草
downloadedAssets.recommendedUse: 暴击、绝技、连杀等夸张艺术字

downloadedAssets.name: Zhi Mang Xing / 志莽行书
downloadedAssets.recommendedUse: 技能名、火系/雷系强化表现、活动标题

marketReference.finding: Public store/community pages expose screenshots and marketing text, but no official font-family disclosure was found. Use legally bundled OFL display fonts that match the popular mobile tower-defense card/button feel instead of copying proprietary game assets.

recommendedFonts.uiTitle: ZCOOLKuaiLe-Regular.ttf for hot mobile-game card/button titles; SmileySans-Oblique.ttf for logo-like splash text
recommendedFonts.uiBody: ZCOOLQingKeHuangYou-Regular.ttf for compact HUD; keep system font for long body text if readability drops
recommendedFonts.damageNumber: Use SmileySans-Oblique.ttf for clearer, heavier battle numbers; generate BMFont later for production damage numbers
